ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "open_avg" REAL /* Average opening price */,
  "open_max" REAL /* Maximum opening price */,
  "open_min" REAL /* Minimum opening price */,
  "open_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of opening price */,
  "open_change" REAL /* Change in opening price */,
  "high_avg" REAL /* Average high price */,
  "high_max" REAL /* Maximum high price */,
  "high_min" REAL /* Minimum high price */,
  "high_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of high price */,
  "high_change" REAL /* Change in high price */,
  "low_avg" REAL /* Average low price */,
  "low_max" REAL /* Maximum low price */,
  "low_min" REAL /* Minimum low price */,
  "low_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of low price */,
  "low_change" REAL /* Change in low price */,
  "close_avg" REAL /* Average closing price */,
  "close_max" REAL /* Maximum closing price */,
  "close_min" REAL /* Minimum closing price */,
  "close_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of closing price */,
  "close_change" REAL /* Change in closing price */,
  "volume_avg" REAL /* Average trading volume */,
  "volume_max" REAL /* Maximum trading volume */,
  "volume_min" REAL /* Minimum trading volume */,
  "volume_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of trading volume */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in trading volume */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of shares traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol representing the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_market FOREIGN KEY ("market") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the market */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector or more specific category within the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "data_delay" TEXT /* Delay between data updates (e.g., 15 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "feed_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was fed */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data content from the feed */,
  "feed_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data feeds (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "feed_status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., active, inactive, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol the alert is based on */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above/below a certain value) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, expired) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert notifications (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the stock */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model used */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol the news is related to */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "news_category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., financial, general, market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)
